description: 忘却前夜装备系统：命轮(Wheels of Destiny)与密契(Covenants)完整数据

system_overview.note: 忘却前夜没有传统武器系统，装备分为命轮和密契两大类。
system_overview.wheel_rules: 同一队伍中不可装备相同命轮。命轮+12后可额外装备第二个SSR命轮。命轮以3叠(3个重复合并)性能评估。
system_overview.covenant_rules: 密契系统于账号35级解锁，每套6件，提供3件套和6件套效果。

wheels_of_destiny.description: 命轮是通过抽卡获取的装备道具，类似专属武器，提供属性和被动效果。

ssr_limited_oblivion.name: 至为珍贵的藏品
ssr_limited_oblivion.effect: 击杀后获得永久暴伤buff，最多叠5层。
ssr_limited_oblivion.effect_en:
=== DMG Amplification: 14.4% ===
Team Unique: The wielder's Shield Generation increases by 12%. Gain Shield equal to 10% of the wielder's DEF at the end of the turn, which increases by 2% of the wielder's DEF per turn.

ssr_limited_oblivion.name: 隐秘的诞生
ssr_limited_oblivion.effect: 与「神王的颂歌」「虔诚的伟力」同组。
ssr_limited_oblivion.effect_en: Domain Mastery|team_unique=Increases team health limit by 10%. Increases healing and shields done by the wearer by ≥4% . After playing the wearer's "Strike", recover ≥3% of lost health. After playing the wearer's "Defense", gain a shield of ≥3% of current health. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time per round.|rarity=SSR|image1=Soul Birth wheel of destiny.png}}
ssr_limited_oblivion._wiki_page: Birth of a Soul wheel of destiny

ssr_limited_oblivion.name: 女王的戒律
ssr_limited_oblivion.effect_en:
=== DMG Amplification: 14.4% ===
Team Unique: The wielder's Counter increases by 13%. After playing a card, gain Counter equal to 5% of the wielder's DEF, up to 2 times per turn. If entering ultra space, the wielder gains 6 aliemus. After releasing exile of aliemus, all enemies lose 9% Temporary STR equal to the wielder's DEF.
Wheel of Destiny with the Damage Amplification attribute.

ssr_limited_oblivion.name: 诗笺的句尾
ssr_limited_oblivion.effect: 发动时机调整：由打击前改为打击后。
ssr_limited_oblivion.effect_en:
=== Death Resistance: 50.4% ===
Team Unique: The Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG of the wielder's Command Cards, as well as the shields, HP Recovery, aliemus, and STR generated by Command Cards, are increased by 11%. If the current realm is "Ultra", gain 110 Keyflare after releasing "Annihilation". After entering the Ultra turn, the next Posse released this turn is executed twice.
Wheel of Destiny with the Death Resistance attribute.

ssr_limited_oblivion.name: 隐世的转轮
ssr_limited_oblivion.effect: 从钥令触发和伤害次数中获得增益。

ssr_limited_stellar.name: 不可承受的自由
ssr_limited_stellar.effect_en:
=== DMG Amplification: 14.4% ===
Hand Limit +2. Effects of the same type cannot stack. The wielder's Base DMG and Shield Generation are increased by 9%. Obtain 35 Aliemus upon entering the Ultra Round. Release "Annihilation" to grant all Awakeners Temporary Crit. DMG +13%. This effect has a Cooldown of 3 turns.
Provides steady Shield accumulation plus explosive Aliemus gains in Ultra Turns, unleashing devastating critical hits when the moment arrives.

ssr_limited_stellar.name: 安息之吻
ssr_limited_stellar.effect_en:
=== Crit. DMG: 21.6% ===
Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG +10% During this exploration, every time the wielder kills an enemy, their Crit. Rate +2% and Exalt Base DMG +2%, up to 10 times. If the current Realm is Caro, the wielder gains an extra 15 Aliemus when they directly consume Embryo (cooldown 3 turns).
Increase the wielder's Base DMG dealt, and continuously boosts Exalts DMG and Crit. Rate as exploration progresses. Periodically gains additional Aliemus when consuming Embryo.

ssr_limited_stellar.name: 写实主义悖谬
ssr_limited_stellar.effect: 狂气和力量获取+6-12%；超限后提升最终伤害/护盾/治疗。

ssr_limited_stellar.name: 圣火中的指引
ssr_limited_stellar.effect_en:
=== Death Resistance: 50.4% ===
Team Unique: The Shield caused by the wielder's Exalt increases by 15%. After releasing Exalt, all Awakeners' Temporary Crit. DMG increases by 11%, with each Tentacle increasing by 1%. After each exploration, trigger Resistance for the first time, restoring 13% of Max health at the start of next turn.
Wheel of Destiny with the Death Resistance attribute.

ssr_limited_stellar.name: 琥珀色的死亡
ssr_limited_stellar.effect_en:
=== Crit. DMG: 21.6% ===
Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG dealt +20%, and STR generated +6%. After playing the wielder's Command Card, gain Temporary STR equal to 11% of the wielder's ATK, triggering up to 5 times per turn.
Amplifies the Base DMG dealt by the wielder and their STR acquisition, while continuously generating Temporary STR by playing the wielder's cards.

ssr_standard.name: 神王的颂歌
ssr_standard.effect: 队伍唯一：战斗开始时获得16狂气。其他唤醒体使用超限时获得3狂气。深海队：超限获得2-5%攻击力的触手伤害。

ssr_standard.name: 于暴雨之中
ssr_standard.effect: v1.4增强：打击时对全体敌人施加10%毒素(1次/回合)。

ssr_standard.name: 珊瑚女之死
ssr_standard.effect_en:
=== Death Resistance: 50.4% ===
Team Unique: After playing the wielder's card, gain a Shield equal to 6% of the wielder's Defence. For each Tentacle, increase the Shield by 1.5% of the wielder's Defense. This effect triggers only once per turn.

ssr_standard.name: 溯洄时计
ssr_standard.effect: 使用佩戴者指令卡后，30-60%概率从弃牌堆返回手牌。

ssr_standard.name: 好运时间
ssr_standard.effect_en:
=== Sigil Yield: 10.8% ===
Team Unique: At the start of battle, the wielder's Command Card Crit. Rate + 3% for each relic possessed. After using Exalt, roll a 4-sided die; the wielder gains Aliemus and Temporary Crit. DMG equal to 3 times the roll result. If the roll is 4 or higher, other Awakeners also gain half.
Wheel of Destiny with the Sigil Yield attribute.

ssr_standard.name: 永恒安魂曲
ssr_standard.effect: 暴伤无上限；适合8+回合长期战斗。
ssr_standard.effect_en:
=== Keyflare Regen. Level: 25.2% ===
At the start of exploration, shuffle 1 "Silver Key Radiance" into the draw pile and add "Destroy". After releasing a posse, the wielder's critical damage increases by 5%. When the wielder deals damage, gain Keyflare equal to 80% of the wielder's Keyflare Regen and 8% Temporary critical rate, up to a maximum of 5 times per turn.

ssr_standard.name: 血肉狂宴
ssr_standard.effect: 提供暴伤；通过超限和吞噬获得力量。

ssr_standard.name: 饕餮盛宴
ssr_standard.effect: 增加超限治疗；受伤时获得力量和护盾。

ssr_standard.name: 冬夜忆
ssr_standard.effect: 防止石化溶解无debuff卡手；加速杂兵/精英战。免费可获取命轮。

ssr_standard.name: 吞噬摇篮曲
ssr_standard.effect: 触发死亡抵抗后，全队治疗和护盾增强2回合。

ssr_standard.name: 镜中人
ssr_standard.effect: 队伍唯一：回合结束时获得3狂气。活动限定。

ssr_standard.name: 死亡的剖析
ssr_standard.effect_en:
=== Crit. DMG: 21.6% ===
Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG dealt +20%, and STR generated +6%. After playing the wielder's Command Card, gain Temporary STR equal to 11% of the wielder's ATK, triggering up to 5 times per turn.
Amplifies the Base DMG dealt by the wielder and their STR acquisition, while continuously generating Temporary STR by playing the wielder's cards.

sr_wheels.name: 银鳕的决意
sr_wheels.effect_en:
=== Crit. Rate: 7.2% ===
Team Unique: The wielder enters the Silver Cod persona after exploration begins. Switch between the Silver Cod and Cat personas after using Exalt. Silver Cod: Gain 25 Keyflare after dealing Damage. Cat: Gain a Temporary Crit. DMG increase of +1% after dealing Damage. These effects share a maximum of 5 triggers per turn.
Wheel of Destiny with the Crit. Rate attribute.

r_wheels.name: 惩戒
r_wheels.effect: Boss前保留50黑印=+250%死亡抵抗。评价最高的R命轮。

r_wheels.name: 谵妄
r_wheels.effect: 通过觉醒减少黑印。推荐R命轮。

r_wheels.name: 心之壁垒
r_wheels.effect: 适合高防角色如法洛思或珊。

notes: v2.0后R命轮完全重做，拥有改变探索规则的效果。
到达一定进程后可为唤醒体额外装备一个R或SR命轮。

covenants.description: 密契是装备套装系统，6件一套，提供3件套和6件套效果。账号35级解锁。

sets.name: 猩红之悸
sets.obtain: 商店兑换/调查兑换/相位兑换
sets.effect: 提供双暴(暴击率+暴击伤害)。所有主C通用套装，适用于24、萝坦、尤乌哈希等。

sets.name: 猩红之拥
sets.effect: 适合需要主动出牌的辅助角色。不出牌则效果浪费。
sets.set_6_effect: 打出指令卡后，本回合内指令卡造成的伤害+X%（需主动出牌触发；具体数值待核实）

sets.name: 扭曲双子·黑
sets.effect: 将佩戴者的打击卡复制一张加入牌组。适合萝坦、艾继丝。
sets.set_6_effect: 每回合开始，将佩戴者的1张打击卡（原始版本）加入手牌

sets.name: 扭曲双子·白
sets.effect: 将佩戴者的防御卡复制一张加入牌组。适合奥吉尔、诺帝拉。
sets.set_6_effect: 每回合开始，将佩戴者的1张防御卡（原始版本）加入手牌

sets.name: 荒原狼
sets.effect: 伤害强效+反击/毒素增益。适合莉兹、旺达。v1.4.4后6件套不再需要特定属性。
sets.set_6_effect: 使佩戴者获得反击效果；反击时对目标施加毒素（v1.4.4后移除属性限制；具体毒素层数待核实）

sets.name: 机械降神
sets.effect: 算力/AP相关效果。辅助角色专用。
sets.set_3_effect: 战斗开始时获得1点算力

sets.name: 海归线
sets.effect: 力量加成或额外触手攻击次数。深海系角色专用。

sets.name: 埋骨地的絮语
sets.effect: 6件套：关卡开始+25%死亡抵抗；触发死亡抵抗后获得50狂气。
sets.set_6_effect: 关卡开始时，死亡抵抗+25%；触发死亡抵抗后，获得50狂气

sets.name: 诅咒兔
sets.effect: 治疗+护盾增益。适合萨尔瓦多、朵尔、希莱斯特。v1.4.4后6件套不再需要特定属性。
sets.set_6_effect: 护盾量+12%（v1.4.4后移除属性限制）

sets.name: 远方的欢宴
sets.effect: 大量防御加成。诺帝拉觉醒后每张防御卡可提供200+护盾。v1.4.4后6件套不再需要特定属性。
sets.set_6_effect: 使用防御卡时额外提供护盾加成（v1.4.4后移除属性限制；诺帝拉觉醒后每张防御卡可达200+护盾；具体数值待核实）

sets.name: 无垢
sets.set_6_effect: 释放钥令后，回复等同于装备者体质5%的生命；若银钥充能等级大于20，额外回复5%。同类效果无法重复生效

sets.name: 有机形态
sets.effect: 6件套(队伍唯一)：探索开始时扣除最多100%死亡抵抗；每扣除1%，佩戴者狂气造成伤害+0.15%。
sets.set_6_effect: （队伍唯一）探索开始时扣除最多100%死亡抵抗；每扣除1%，佩戴者狂气造成伤害+0.15%

sets.name: 二律背反
sets.effect: 6件套(队伍唯一)：狂气上限和超限狂气消耗+20；指令卡暴击率、暴伤、护盾、治疗+20%。
sets.set_6_effect: （队伍唯一）狂气上限和超限狂气消耗+20；指令卡暴击率、暴伤、护盾、治疗+20%

sets.name: 入药之梦
sets.effect: 6件套(队伍唯一)：战斗结束时黑印获取-8；战斗开始时将佩戴者非打击/非防御指令卡原始版本加入抽牌堆(每种最多1张)。
sets.set_6_effect: （队伍唯一）战斗结束时黑印获取-8；战斗开始时将佩戴者非打击/非防御指令卡原始版本加入抽牌堆（每种最多1张）

sets.name: 36室之环
sets.effect: 6件套(队伍唯一)：银钥上限和银钥技能消耗+200；超限暴击率、暴伤、护盾、治疗+30%。
sets.set_6_effect: （队伍唯一）银钥上限和银钥技能消耗+200；超限暴击率、暴伤、护盾、治疗+30%

sets.name: 进化异变
sets.effect: 英文攻略中提及的密契套装。

sets.name: 启示录
sets.effect: 终局内容使用的密契套装。

character_signature_wheels.description: 已确认的角色专属命轮对应关系
